scripts.test:ci:cli-emitters: npm run build --workspace=packages/core --workspace=packages/emitters --workspace=packages/optimizer --workspace=packages/evaluator --workspace=packages/cli && npm run check:bundled --workspace=packages/cli && npm test --workspace=packages/cli && npm test --workspace=packages/emitters && npm test --workspace=packages/optimizer
scripts.test:ci:pr: npm run test:ci:cli-emitters && npm run test:cli:fast
scripts.test:ci:repos: npm run build --workspace=packages/core --workspace=packages/emitters --workspace=packages/optimizer --workspace=packages/evaluator --workspace=packages/cli && npm run test:cli:repos:fast
